response:
<<THE MAXIMUM LIKELIHOOD ESTIMATORS FOR PARAMETERS>>

THE MAXIMUM LIKELIHOOD ESTIMATORS FOR PARAMETERS ARE DERIVED AS FOLLOWS:

THE MLE FOR MU_X IS [THE SAMPLE MEAN OF PRE-TREATMENT BLOOD PRESSURE VALUES].  
THE MLE FOR MU_Y IS [THE SAMPLE MEAN OF POST-TREATMENT BLOOD PRESSURE VALUES].  
THE MLE FOR SIGMA_X squared IS [THE SAMPLE VARIANCE OF PRE-TREATMENT BLOOD PRESSURE VALUES].  
THE MLE FOR SIGMA_Y squared IS [THE SAMPLE VARIANCE OF POST-TREATMENT BLOOD PRESSURE VALUES].  
THE MLE FOR SIGMA_XY IS [THE COVARIANCE BETWEEN PRE-TREATMENT AND POST-TREATMENT BLOOD PRESSURE VALUES].

<<THE HYPOTHESIS TEST FOR THE EFFECT OF THE DRUG>>

TO TEST THE HYPOTHESIS THAT THE DRUG HAS A SIGNIFICANT EFFECT ON REDUCING BLOOD PRESSURE, WE CONDUCT A HYPOTHESIS TEST USING THE DERIVED MLEs.

THE NULL HYPOTHESIS IS [THE DRUG HAS NO EFFECT ON REDUCING BLOOD PRESSURE].  
THE ALTERNATIVE HYPOTHESIS IS [THE DRUG DOES HAVE A SIGNIFICANT EFFECT ON REDUCING BLOOD PRESSURE].  
THE TEST STATISTIC IS [THE ESTIMATED COVARIANCE MATRIX BETWEEN PRE-TREATMENT AND POST-TREATMENT BLOOD PRESSURE VALUES].  
THE REJECTION CRITERIA IS [THE TEST STATISTIC IS GREATER THAN THE CRITICAL VALUE AT A SIGNIFICANCE LEVEL OF 0.05].

THE REJECTION CRITERIA IS [THE TEST STATISTIC IS GREATER THAN THE CRITICAL VALUE AT A SIGNIFICANCE LEVEL OF 0.05].
